title: add lut2bmux
body:
Some downstream Yosys passes and mappings operate on $bmux but not $lut so designs synthesized to $lut cannot benefit from them. This PR implements the rewrite from $lut to $bmux without changing default behavior. This way those flows can be leveraged. 

lut2bmux transforms each selected $lut cell into an equivalent $bmux cell by:
1. Moving $lut input port A to $bmux select port S
2. Replacing the $lut parameter with the $bmux data input
3. Removing the $lut parameter and fixing parameters

For testing, use tests/techmap/lut2bmux.ys.
